name: smart_zone.ui_entry_current_runtime_guard
description: Minimal current-runtime Smart Zone UI-entry guard: load gameplay, press the default Zone Manager key, trace default-action dispatch, and stop after OCR proves or blocks the Zones manager title.

evidence_contract.green_path: current-runtime startup/load -> verified focus -> default Zone Manager key -> dispatch trace invokes ACTION_ZONES -> OCR/structured capture contains Zones manager
evidence_contract.non_green_rule: startup/load, stale runtime, dispatch trace without Zone Manager UI, or ordinary gameplay/actions UI after the key is not Zone Manager entry proof. No add-zone/filter/generation steps are credited in this probe.

steps.label: gameplay_loaded_screen_gate
steps.expected_visible_fact: normal gameplay is loaded before Zone Manager input

steps.label: open_zones_manager
steps.expected_visible_fact: Zone Manager UI is visibly open through the default DEFAULTMODE zones binding
steps.abort_reason: Zone Manager title text missing after default zones key; stop before any add-zone/filter/generation input.

harness_profile_precondition.control_path: Uses default printable DEFAULTMODE zones=Y plus OPENCLAW_HARNESS_UI_TRACE default-action dispatch logging; this probe intentionally stops after Zone Manager entry and does not credit Smart Zone generation.
